notFound.title: QR code not found
notFound.message: This QR code does not exist or has been deleted.

inactive.title: QR code disabled
inactive.message: This QR code has been disabled by its owner.

expired.title: QR code expired
expired.message: This QR code is no longer valid.

unavailable.title: Content unavailable
unavailable.message: The content of this QR code is missing or incomplete.

password.title: Protected content
password.message: Enter the password to access this content.

autoOpen: Opening automatically… If nothing happens, use the button below.

wifi.title: Wi-Fi connection
wifi.hint: Scan this QR code with your phone camera to connect automatically.
